blocks.content: At the top of a 23-story building, seven guild members were preparing for a raid.
They were all rankers.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Is everyone here?
As the thick door, like a hangar, opened, the Operator walked down the expansive runway.

blocks.speaker: Yagwi
blocks.content: Eight members in total. It's our first time taking on Arachne with this setup, but we need to push hard. The Solar War is coming up.
He had chosen a monstrous form, with a flat, diamond-shaped face like a shield and a cloak.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Yes.
As the Operator walked like a cat, the long sword on her back swayed side to side.

blocks.speaker: Yagwi
blocks.content: Yahweh2, huh.
She had checked the hit news on the global bulletin board.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: I will never lose!
As she clenched her fists, the High Gear cycle rapidly surged, and her machine vibrated.
All members, prepare for deployment.
High Gear, level 487.
With immense output, her machine shot forward like a cannon.
Leaping at supersonic speed, she passed the entire city and landed in the wasteland.
The sprint resumed, and the sonic boom made West Country users turn their heads.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: What? How is that machine so fast?

blocks.speaker: Yagwi
blocks.content: Idiot, it's the Ascension Guild. Operator, Little Witch, Yagwi, Taedaecheon… they're all rankers.
The Operator's AI showed a blue sea.
Switching to high-speed mode.
Rocket engines emerged from her deeply indented back, spraying immense pressure.
Four minutes later
The raid point, Skull Island, came into view for the guild members.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'Trap zone.'
The control tower on the island lit up, and a massive red laser net surged forward.
Trap level - 467.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: She could evade with AI, but she disabled the function and relied on her senses.
Zing! Zing! Zing!
As the laser net narrowly missed the Operator, a guild member whistled.

blocks.speaker: Yagwi
blocks.content: Her combat sense is the best.
After the trap zone, Little Witch sped up to catch up with the Operator.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: What's going on? You usually trust the system. AI would save power.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: …I don't like the feeling of dulled senses.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Hmm.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Yahweh.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: What kind of person is he? In reality, I mean.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Surprising. You mentioned reality. Does it bother you that much? You'll win anyway.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: A video was posted on the bulletin board. He bypassed space using the designer's code. Is that possible?

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: I don't know. I'm just a user. What I can tell you is that in reality, he's someone who can do even more easily. He's the greatest mage in human history.
The Operator replayed the video.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'He took down an enemy over 50 levels higher. Of course, he was equipped with Grim Reaper…'

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: With similar durability, penetration was possible.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'In other words, it was a situation where energy beams couldn't win. Beyond special abilities, he's a human with overwhelming combat experience.'

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: The Operator muttered, 'Even so, this is my world.'
At that moment, the island shook, and a colossal machine emerged from the forest.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Graaaah!
Boss creature Arachne.
A colossal weapon at level 588 appeared, and the AI transmitted the creature's information.
The spider-like machine, weighing hundreds of thousands of tons, opened 8,000 gun ports to greet her.
All members, standby. I'll signal.
Flying solo, she saw 20,000 bullets darkening the scenery.
Bullet barrage level, 499.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: I won't lose.
Dodging the barrage with acrobatic flight, she landed on the island, where small creatures swarmed.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Haaa!
The Operator twisted her body.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Every time she changed direction, it felt like the machine was screaming in agony.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'Closer, closer!'
As she made a sudden stop, 27 tons of pressure hit her right knee, triggering a warning message.
Unstable durability detected.
Sliding on the ground, she twisted her body at the limit to disperse the force.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: A monster is a monster.
With extreme combat nerves, the Operator analyzed all the creatures' attack patterns.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'Shirone senses, but the Operator calculates.'

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Who is superior?
Sliding backward, the Operator braked with her left hand gripping the ground.
Sparks flew from her fingers.
Slowing down near Arachne, she grabbed the handle of the black long sword on her back.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'Physical attack here.'
As Arachne raised its leg, a massive shadow loomed over her.
Collapse (Magnetic Force).
A level 480 selective option, currently only activated with the black long sword.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'This timing is the only chance.'
As the blade struck the ground, a black magnetic field swelled into a massive sphere.
Graaaah!
Caught in the magnetic field, Arachne twisted its hundreds of thousands of joints, struggling.
Rumble!
Finally, four legs were forcibly bent, and the massive body crashed to the ground.
All seven guild members attacked simultaneously.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Let's make it hot!
Sun-like flashes erupted over the island, and the seawater surged like a wall.
That Evening
Atogram was bustling with users from all over the continent.

blocks.speaker: RubyRuby
blocks.content: This is RubyRuby from East Country. Many of you have seen the videos, but the burning question is whether Yahweh2's group has reached level 70. As a personal reporter, I'll try to get an interview.
The voices of users saying the same thing mixed, making it noisier than a marketplace.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Look, there they are!
Yahweh2's group, equipped with the Grim Reaper, was walking quickly into the shopping district.

blocks.speaker: Death Princess
blocks.content: I'm tired. This is exhausting.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: We're not done yet. We need to reach level 80 by dawn to meet the deadline.

blocks.speaker: RubyRuby
blocks.content: Hello! This is RubyRuby! What's your current level? Why are you doing this? Is it a secret project of Golden Wheel?

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Move! We're busy!
Destroyer707 pushed RubyRuby aside, but the reporters followed closely.

blocks.speaker: RubyRuby
blocks.content: Just a few words! Is this for the record?

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Ignoring the barrage of questions, they entered a shop, but it wasn't Amara; it was Suicide Corp.

blocks.speaker: Death Princess
blocks.content: Aren't we switching to Amara?

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Amara is the best for hunting level 70 creatures at level 70. But we're raising the difficulty. We're heading to a level 100 hunting ground, so speed is crucial. More importantly…

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Yahweh2 has different abilities. As long as the output keeps up, he can quickly take down level 100 creatures.

blocks.speaker: Death Princess
blocks.content: Ah.
After ordering from the manager, the items were quickly delivered, and they immediately replaced their parts.
With a clear sound, the Grim Reaper parts rolled around them.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: A moment of silence followed.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: 'Will they discard those too? They probably will.'

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Unlike the Hundred General set, these parts were coveted even by intermediate users.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: True to the company's focus on speed, Suicide's parts were sharp and cold.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: They were also specialized in melee weapons, with performance depending on the user's skill.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: 'What a waste.'

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Destroyer707 felt a pang of regret.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Should we keep the Grim Reaper? It's a real masterpiece. If we leave it here…

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Users would swarm like bees.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Let's just go. We'd have to visit a storage service. We can buy it again later with the credit card.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: True, but…

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: The problem was the users eagerly waiting for Yahweh2's group to leave.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Alright! Let's go!
As soon as they stepped out, the shop became noisy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Tch! They're having a blast.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone consoled Destroyer707.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I regret it too. But we can't solve problems without giving up something. Every goal has risks, so let's stay focused on our objective.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Hmph! Easy for you to say. You sound just like Bart. You really resemble him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Bart?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: My personal magic tutor. He doesn't teach much but always says boring things.

blocks.speaker: Death Princess
blocks.content: Oh? You learn magic?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Learn? Not really. Spirit Zone or whatever, I can't grasp it no matter what.

blocks.speaker: Death Princess
blocks.content: Haha! Same here. My dad made me try, but I just got sleepy when I concentrated.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone looked weary.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I thought they weren't ordinary kids if they got into the undercoder, but having Bart as a personal tutor…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If it was Brian Bart, he was a top-tier archmage.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Well, it can't be helped now. Let's level up quickly. Suicide's main weapons are melee. Aim for the gaps in the armor, and be careful; the durability is low.

blocks.speaker: Death Princess
blocks.content: Hmm, got it.
Entering the level 100 hunting ground, they saw medium-sized creatures unlike before.
Screech!
As the quadrupedal enemies charged, Shirone smirked.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I can see it.
Flowing smoothly like water among the vicious creatures, Shirone's machine cut them down.
Two days passed as promised.
Huff! Huff!
Arriving in Atogram, they were greeted with applause from users.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Level 100 in 48 hours! It's a record!

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Destroyer707 collapsed to the ground.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: We did it. We really did it.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Congratulations. We've been waiting.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: It's Aegis! Take pictures!
Reporters rushed in, but as they got close, they all grimaced.
Ugh!
It was a selective option, one of the few implemented in the city, causing radio interference.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Sorry, but we'll exercise our right to refuse unauthorized filming.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Aegis politely announced and bowed to Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Let's go.
Arriving in the northern slums, she entered a much shabbier bar than before.
Golden Wheel's first team was seated, and the bartender opened a door to a deep passage.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Sensing the serious atmosphere, Shirone asked, 'Is this the real start?'

blocks.speaker: Bart
blocks.content: Yes. The boss will explain the details. Oh, and there's another guest.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Guest?

blocks.speaker: Bart
blocks.content: Please, go in.
Opening the iron door at the end of the passage, they saw Yolga's Son sitting on the bed, raising his hand.

blocks.speaker: Yolga's Son
blocks.content: Congratulations. Level 100 in two days. Impressive.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Not in the mood for a handshake, Shirone raised an eyebrow and entered the room.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh?
There was an unfamiliar user at the tea table.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Is this the guest?'
Short legs dangled from the chair, with hands resting between them.
The face was unreadable.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hello? It's been a while.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Do you… know me?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone used the search function but found limited information, indicating a West Country user.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: User codename, Little Witch.
